intent.goal: Create a guided 5-phase PR workflow that takes a GitHub issue or code change request and produces a professional pull request with human approval gating.
intent.context: Simplified version of PRForgeVibe's execution lane. Demonstrates VibeFlow methodology: agent profiles for phase enforcement, custom tools for gating, hooks for quality, GitNexus MCP for code intelligence.

in_scope: Per-phase tool enforcement via agent profiles

intent.desired_behavior: The model progresses through phases by calling advance_phase. Each phase has a distinct agent profile with restricted tools. The model cannot skip phases or call tools not in the current schema. Human approval is required before push.
non_goals: Full autonomous operation without human approval
success_criteria: Phase transitions are gated and cannot be skipped
Unauthorized writes in read-only phases are blocked
Recovery from empty responses and phase stalls
constraints: Tier B max (no source modifications to vibe/core/)
assumptions: GitNexus MCP configured and repo indexed

components.name: Agent Profiles (5 profiles)
components.purpose: Per-phase tool enforcement and model selection

components.name: advance_phase tool
components.purpose: Gated phase transition with scope check, GitNexus evidence validation, dirty-tree detection

components.name: check_scope tool
components.purpose: Mid-phase scope verification (preview only, does not gate)

components.name: init_state tool
components.purpose: Initialize workflow state file, create branch

components.name: POST_AGENT_TURN hooks
components.purpose: Lint and typecheck in IMPLEMENT and VALIDATE phases only

components.name: GitNexus MCP
components.purpose: Code intelligence for INVESTIGATE phase (query, context, impact)

components.name: explore subagent
components.purpose: Parallel investigation of subsystems during INVESTIGATE

requirements.description: Phase transitions must be gated — model cannot skip phases
requirements.success_proof: advance_phase tool validates current phase, checks gates, and calls switch_agent_callback. Profile rebuilds ToolManager with new enabled_tools.

requirements.description: Tool schema must change between phases
requirements.success_proof: Each profile has distinct enabled_tools. Profile switch rebuilds ToolManager. Model physically cannot call tools not in schema.

requirements.description: Unauthorized file modifications in read-only phases must be blocked
requirements.success_proof: advance_phase checks git status --porcelain before/after. Dirty source files in INTAKE/INVESTIGATE block transition.
All state in ~/.vibe/runs/<repo>/state.json. Agent profile survives natively. todo_state serialized to disk before advance.

requirements.description: Recovery from empty model responses and phase stalls
requirements.success_proof: advance_phase returns structured result. If model stalls (no advance call), next turn injects retry. Max 5 retries.
PUSH profile has no tools except bash and ask_user_question. Model must call ask_user_question and wait for response.

requirements.description: GitNexus evidence required for INVESTIGATE→IMPLEMENT transition
requirements.success_proof: advance_phase checks gitnexus_evidence in state.json. Transition blocked without substantive query/context/impact results.

requirements.description: Hooks must only run in IMPLEMENT and VALIDATE phases
requirements.success_proof: HookConfig.phases = ['implement', 'validate']. HooksManager filters by current phase derived from agent profile name.

surfaceDecisions.reason: Agent profiles, model selection, tool permissions, hook enablement, compaction model — all config-driven.
surfaceDecisions.validationEvidence: Config loads correctly, profiles parse, hooks register

surfaceDecisions.reason: The primary enforcement mechanism. enabled_tools physically prevents model from calling tools not in schema. Model selection per phase enables cost optimization.
surfaceDecisions.validationEvidence: Model cannot call write_file in INTAKE — tool not in schema

surfaceDecisions.reason: Phase gating, scope checking, and state initialization require deterministic logic that the model cannot bypass. Custom tools with structured results.
surfaceDecisions.validationEvidence: Phase gate blocks without GitNexus evidence; scope check detects contract violations

surfaceDecisions.reason: GitNexus provides code intelligence (query, context, impact) that the model cannot fabricate. MCP tools are the integration path.
Automated quality gates (lint, typecheck) must run without model involvement. Hooks are subprocesses — no API cost.
surfaceDecisions.validationEvidence: Lint errors in IMPLEMENT trigger retry; same errors in INTAKE are ignored

surfaceDecisions.reason: Middleware is a loop guard, not a phase orchestrator. Phase gating via advance_phase tool is more reliable and testable. Middleware would fire N+1 times per turn and cannot observe what the model produced.
surfaceDecisions.reconsiderIf: Need for turn-level budget enforcement or read-only reminders that apply to ALL phases uniformly

surfaceDecisions.reason: This workflow is designed for Tier B. No source modifications to vibe/core/ needed. All enforcement via profiles, tools, and hooks.
surfaceDecisions.reconsiderIf: Need bash mutation guard at the loop level (PRForgeVibe uses this for read-only phase enforcement)
